name: Alien Buster
description: Alien Buster is an adrenaline-fueled shooting game that pits players against a relentless alien invasion in a quest to save Earth. Equipped with an arsenal of futuristic weapons, players face off against waves of powerful extraterrestrial enemies across a variety of intense levels and visually stunning landscapes. Alien Buster is perfect for fans of space combat and shooter games, offering hours of thrilling gameplay. Do you have what it takes to defend Earth and become the ultimate alien-bursting hero? Download Alien Buster today and join the battle!
instructions: Desktop Use the on-screen directional buttons Press the left button on the mouse to move left side and press right button to move your character right And tap anywhere on the screen to shoot aliens Mobile Use the on-screen directional buttons Pre
